---
title: "About"
---

**Devlogs** is a joint research blog by [LGND AI](https://lgnd.ai) and [Clay](https://madewithclay.org) — sharing research notes, technical deep-dives, and reproducible experiments at the frontier of geospatial AI and foundation models.

Our goal is to contribute openly to a better geoAI ecosystem: publishing what we learn, what surprises us, and what we think others should know.

**What you'll find here:** technical posts with code, novel findings from our research, and honest notes from the lab bench.
